title: Node Lifecycle Topic Payload
description: JSON Schema for payloads published by nodes to hexe/nodes/<node_id>/lifecycle.

node_id.description: Canonical node identifier. This must match the <node_id> topic segment.

lifecycle_state.description: Current lifecycle state of the node process.

reported_at.description: UTC timestamp when the node generated this lifecycle payload.

ready.description: Convenience flag indicating whether the node is currently ready to accept work.

desired_state.description: Optional target state when transitioning, for example ready or stopped.
